variants: Karmen Radman is a distinguished figure in the field of Human Factors Engineering. She is known for her contributions to the discipline, including the publication of her influential work, the Entropy Shield Blueprint. In recognition of her innovative approach, Karmen received the Lichen Bell Medal. She is also an active member of the Labyrinthine Gamemasters Guild, where her passion for intricate game design shines through. Karmen credits her mentor, Ibrahim Tsikata, for guiding her scholarly journey.

She often reflects on the invaluable mentorship received from Ibrahim Tsikata during her formative years.
